_comment: Sample ACL. Passwords are argon2id hashes (mint with `slater hash-password`), never cleartext — this file lives on shared storage. The plain-JSON file format is honoured; the secrets within are hashed. Grants are per-graph: `read` serves queries; `write` additionally permits MERGE/SET/DELETE and CALL slater.consolidate() when the writable layer (delta.enabled) is on. `read` does NOT imply `write`.
